headlines.title_cn: Ask HN: Add flag for AI-generated articles
headlines.title_en: Ask HN: Add flag for AI-generated articles
headlines.summary_cn:
Should HN add the ability to flag articles as AI-generated? This doesn't have to act as a regular flag, i.e., it won't de-rank the article; it could just show up as an indicator, allowing others (like myself) who don't like reading AI-generated text, to skip it.

Open questions:

1. Why is the regular voting system not enough?

2. Should HN change in response to the gen AI era? It has been successful not changing fundamentals.

Open questions:

1. Why is the regular voting system not enough?

2. Should HN change in response to the gen AI era? It has been successful not changing fundamentals.

items.title_cn: The wildest allegations in Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI
items.title_en: The wildest allegations in Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI
items.summary_cn: Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI contains allegations that range from employees joking about unauthorized access to Apple’s systems to claims that job candidates were asked to bring Apple hardware to interviews. Here are the complaint’s most eye-catching claims.
items.summary_en: Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI contains allegations that range from employees joking about unauthorized access to Apple’s systems to claims that job candidates were asked to bring Apple hardware to interviews. Here are the complaint’s most eye-catching claims.

items.title_cn: Sam Altman’s space data center trash talk is what most experts already believe
items.title_en: Sam Altman’s space data center trash talk is what most experts already believe
items.summary_cn: Responding to Musk accusing him of being a scammer, Altman said, "homeboy you're the one sellling [sic] public market investors on short-term space datacenters."
items.summary_en: Responding to Musk accusing him of being a scammer, Altman said, "homeboy you're the one sellling [sic] public market investors on short-term space datacenters."
